ddls:
CREATE TABLE "abalone_data" (
  "abalone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each abalone */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the abalone was collected */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the abalone (M, F, I for male, female, infant) */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the abalone in meters */,
  "diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the abalone in meters */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the abalone in meters */,
  "whole_weight" REAL /* Whole weight of the abalone in kilograms */,
  "shucked_weight" REAL /* Shucked weight of the abalone in kilograms */,
  "viscera_weight" REAL /* Viscera weight of the abalone in kilograms */,
  "shell_weight" REAL /* Shell weight of the abalone in kilograms */,
  "rings" INTEGER /* Number of rings, which indicates the age of the abalone */,
  "collected_by" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who collected the abalone */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the abalone was collected */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the abalone */,
  "water_quality" TEXT /* Water quality at the time of collection */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Health status of the abalone (e.g., healthy, sick, deceased) */,
  "genetic_marker" TEXT /* Genetic marker or identifier for genetic studies */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Detailed environmental conditions at the time of collection */,
  "image_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary image of the abalone */,
  "video_id" INTEGER /* ID of the primary video of the abalone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("abalone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_abalone_data_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_abalone_data_image_id FOREIGN KEY ("image_id") REFERENCES data_files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_abalone_data_video_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_id") REFERENCES data_files ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_abalone_data_collected_by FOREIGN KEY ("collected_by") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site (e.g., coordinates, region) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the site, including environmental conditions */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "depth" REAL /* Average depth of the site in meters */,
  "tidal_range" REAL /* Tidal range at the site */,
  "substrate_type" TEXT /* Type of substrate (e.g., sand, rock, coral) */,
  "current_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the current (e.g., weak, moderate, strong) */,
  "water_quality" TEXT /* Overall water quality at the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the researcher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., lead researcher, assistant) */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Areas of expertise of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or organization the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "abalone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the abalone the file belongs to */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., image, video, document) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the file content */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., JPEG, MP4, PDF) */,
  "thumbnail_path" TEXT /* Path to a thumbnail image of the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_abalone_id FOREIGN KEY ("abalone_id") REFERENCES abalone_data ("abalone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_data" (
  "env_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental data entry */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the data was collected */,
  "water_temperature" REAL /* Water temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "salinity" REAL /* Salinity in parts per thousand */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH level of the water */,
  "dissolved_oxygen" REAL /* Dissolved oxygen in milligrams per liter */,
  "turbidity" REAL /* Turbidity in nephelometric turbidity units (NTU) */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the environmental data was collected */,
  "atm_pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure in millibars */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in meters per second */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction (e.g., N, S, E, W) */,
  "wave_height" REAL /* Height of waves in meters */,
  "sunlight_intensity" REAL /* Intensity of sunlight in lux */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("env_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_data_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password */,
  "last_logged_in" TEXT /* Last login date and time */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Active status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "abalone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the abalone being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the abalone data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the abalone data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_abalone_id FOREIGN KEY ("abalone_id") REFERENCES abalone_data ("abalone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_details" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project, including objectives and scope */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator leading the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_outcome" TEXT /* Summary of the project's outcomes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_details_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_abalones" (
  "project_abalone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-abalone link */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "abalone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the abalone */,
  "role_in_project" TEXT /* Role of the abalone in the project (e.g., primary, secondary) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the abalone's involvement in the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the abalone's involvement in the project */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the abalone in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_abalone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_abalones_abalone_id FOREIGN KEY ("abalone_id") REFERENCES abalone_data ("abalone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_abalones_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES project_details ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_researchers" (
  "project_researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project-researcher link */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "role_in_project" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the project (e.g., lead, assistant) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the researcher's involvement in the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the researcher's involvement in the project */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or observations about the researcher in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_researchers_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_researchers_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES project_details ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data change */,
  "abalone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the abalone whose data was changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "field_changed" TEXT /* Name of the field that was changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the field */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the field */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., add, update, delete) */,
  "change_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the change process in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_changes_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_changes_abalone_id FOREIGN KEY ("abalone_id") REFERENCES abalone_data ("abalone_id")
)
